description: Auth-row evidence mapping for the 146-row current-release compatibility profile. All included rows are explicitly mapped and evidence-backed; 49 explicit profile exclusions are outside scope rather than counted as passes or not applicable. These comprise 25 Arc/Safari paths, four Opera GX/Ubuntu generic paths unsupported by the exact pinned upstream, 10 Windows Chrome/Edge paths that Zero supports but pinned notebooklm-py==0.7.2 / rookiepy==0.5.6 cannot execute, and 10 Chromium/Vivaldi macOS cookie paths deferred to a future release.
